My Work

Projects

01

Ai4A — Artificial Intelligence for All

An initiative-based project exploring how AI can be made accessible and understandable for everyone. Covered ethical AI principles, practical ML applications, and real-world AI use cases in everyday scenarios.

Artificial Intelligence Machine Learning Ethics in AI
🤖
02

Design Thinking Project

Applied the 5-stage Design Thinking methodology — Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test — to solve a real-world problem. Involved user research, brainstorming, rapid prototyping and iterative testing for a human-centered solution.

Design Thinking Innovation Prototyping
💡
03

ACE Chemistry Project — ACE-AS1201

Academic project built around the ACE-AS1201 Chemistry course. Involved practical experimentation, chemical analysis, and applying theoretical knowledge from the Coursera preparatory course to real lab scenarios and problem sets.

Chemistry ACE-AS1201 Laboratory Research
